{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Ekerinatoth's Path of the Flowing Flame
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekerinatoth]] has the [[Path of the Flowing Flame]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
